frames.description: The scene shows a street-side view of a property enclosed by a rusty metal and wire fence. A long blue banner stretches across the top. To the right, a sign for a sanitaryware brand is partially visible.
signs: गोदाम (partially legible Hindi on fence sign)
frames.infrastructure: Metal and wire fencing, structural poles, and lush trees in the background.
frames.motion: The camera is beginning to pan or move to the right along the property line.

frames.description: The camera continues moving right, revealing more of the industrial area. A large stack of red clay bricks is piled neatly in front of a weathered brick wall.
frames.infrastructure: Stack of bricks, brick wall, metal fence continuation.
frames.motion: Continued movement to the right, showing more of the brick stack.

frames.description: The frame centers on a large pile of bricks and a brick wall with faded Hindi writing. In the background, a multi-story brick building is under construction under a cloudy sky.
frames.infrastructure: Large brick piles, aged brick wall, building under construction.
frames.motion: The camera moves past the brick storage area towards a gated section.

frames.description: A long brick wall is covered with large hand-painted Hindi advertisements. To the right is a large, grey, corrugated metal sliding gate. The construction building is still visible on the far right.
signs: गुप्त रोगी डा. शेख शाहगंज आगरा
frames.infrastructure: Brick wall with graffiti, large metal sliding gate, construction site.
frames.motion: Movement past the advertisement wall towards the gate and adjacent building.

frames.description: The camera passes the metal gate and shows a small, shuttered concrete building with a sign above the door. Next to it, a modern building with a pink facade and glass windows begins.
signs: शुभ गर्भाणी के मालिश श्री निवास गुप्ता
frames.infrastructure: Small shop with closed shutters, concrete wall, modern building with pink trim.
frames.motion: Transitioning from a construction/industrial zone to a more commercial area.

frames.description: The view is focused on the front of a modern hospital building. It has wide stone steps leading up to an entrance and a green horizontal sign. The building features blue-tinted glass panels and red-pink vertical accents.
frames.infrastructure: Hospital building, wide stone staircase, glass facade.
frames.motion: The camera is now passing directly in front of the hospital.

frames.description: A narrow alleyway sits between the hospital and the next set of commercial buildings. A small street kiosk is visible on the sidewalk. A metal ladder is propped up against the wall of the neighboring building.
signs: S.K. Marble & Tiles (partially visible in distance)
frames.pedestrians: A person is sitting inside the small street kiosk.
frames.infrastructure: Hospital building side, narrow alley, street kiosk, metal ladder.
frames.motion: Moving past the hospital into a dense commercial storefront area.

frames.description: The scene shows several hardware and sanitaryware shops. Multiple signs for well-known brands are visible. Various ceramic sinks and pedestals are displayed on the sidewalk outside.
frames.infrastructure: Commercial storefronts, sidewalk displays of sanitaryware.
frames.motion: Continuing at a steady pace past retail shops.

frames.description: Further storefronts are shown, including a paint shop and a general trade shop. Two motorcycles are parked on the unpaved road shoulder in front of the stores.
frames.vehicles: Two black motorcycles parked on the roadside.
frames.infrastructure: Commercial buildings, unpaved roadside, parked motorcycles.
frames.motion: Moving past the row of hardware and paint stores.

frames.description: The final frame shows a corner medical store and a motor shop. A man in a white shirt stands at the counter of the pharmacy. A motorcycle is parked in the foreground, and the street turns into a dirt path on the right.
frames.pedestrians: One person standing at the pharmacy counter.
frames.vehicles: One black motorcycle parked near the store entrance.
frames.infrastructure: Corner shop building, pharmacy counter, dirt road.
frames.motion: The camera is nearing the end of the building block or turning a corner.
